segments.text: The process of photosynthesis is essential for plants, as it allows them to convert light energy into chemical en
. This process primarily occurs in the leaves, where chlorophyll absorbs sunlight. During photosynthesis, carbon d
from the atmosphere is combined with water taken up by the roots. The result is glucose, which serves as food for the plant, and oxygen, a vital b
. This oxygen is released into the atmosphere, contributing significantly to the air we breathe. Understanding photosynthesis is crucial for e
, as it explains how energy flows through ecosystems and supports life on Earth.

academic.passage: Photosynthesis is the process by which green plants and some other organisms use sunlight to synthesize foods with the help of chlorophyll. It primarily occurs in the chloroplasts of plant cells, converting carbon dioxide and water into glucose and oxygen. This process is vital not only for plant growth but also for maintaining atmospheric oxygen levels and supporting life on Earth.

questions.q: What is the main purpose of photosynthesis?
questions.explain: 這個問題的正確答案是「為植物產生能量」，因為光合作用的主要目的是將光能轉化為化學能。
正確答案是「在葉子中」，因為葉子是進行光合作用的主要部位。

questions.q: What can be inferred about the importance of photosynthesis?
options: It is only important for plants
It has no impact on the environment
questions.explain: 可以推斷光合作用對於維持氧氣水平是重要的，因此正確答案是「它有助於維持氧氣水平」。
葉綠素的主要功能是「吸收陽光」，因此正確答案是這個選項。

daily.passage: Attention students! The library will be closed for maintenance this Saturday from 9 AM to 3 PM. Please plan your study sessions accordingly.

questions.q: When will the library be closed?
questions.explain: 正確答案是「這個星期六」，因為公告中提到將在這個星期六關閉。

questions.q: What time will the library close?
questions.explain: 正確答案是「從上午9點到下午3點」，這是公告中提供的具體時間。
